title: Default Dark Mode Additional Compat
description: DDM compat for Disenchanter, Nyf's Quivers and Vanilla* Horses
body: Adds [Default Dark Mode](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/default-dark-mode) styled UI textures for [Disenchanter](https://modrinth.com/mod/disenchanter), [Nyf's Quivers](https://modrinth.com/mod/nyfs-quivers), and [Vanilla* Horses](https://modrinth.com/mod/vanillastar-horses). Includes retextures of the disenchanter GUI, quiver inventory GUI, and the horseshoe slot.
